full_text:
Quan Jing 全静
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Jing (全静). Son of Quan Cong who defected to Wei. Quan Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
